/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_docx.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_docx.dir/main.cpp.o -o test_docx  libdocx_temp_helper.a /home/hong/code/rm_back/docx_temp_helper/third_party/minizip/lib/libminizip.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /home/hong/code/rm_back/docx_temp_helper/third_party/pugixml/lib/libpugixml.a
